sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24683" key="diadekth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διαδεκ-τήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">διαδέχομαι</etym>) <sense id="n24683.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">transmitter,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σημείων</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0058.tlg001.perseus-grc1:6:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aen.Tact.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.4</biblScope></bibl></cit>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0058.tlg001.perseus-grc1:7:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
